prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为85450→103820→90069→101079→117960名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年达近5年最高位次117960名，较2024年后移约16881名， 下行压力明显；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为20、19、22、28、33人，持续扩招；2026年计划35人，较2025年增加2人（+6.1%），扩招使竞争略有 缓解，位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西藏大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2025年约第195名，2026年未进入前200名，属中后段211院校；声誉文件无西藏大学显著事件记录；抖音热度排名第30位（较热），综合热度约138万，短视频平台有一定关注度。投档异常文件无该校断档记录；第五轮学 科评估。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 广东省2026年物理类考生约456,000人，较2025年440,208人增加约15,792人（ +3.6%），考生规模小幅扩大；西藏大学位于西藏拉萨，距广东较远，地域偏好可能偏低；该 校在广东物理类招生人数2025年33人，属跨省招生中偏小规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年小幅扩招（+6.1%）及物理类考生小幅增加（+3.6%）， 扩招效应略大于考生增量，竞争略有缓解但位次仍将后移；抖音较热关注度有一定对冲。预测2026年物理类最低位次约122549名，区间122049–123049名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 85,450 → 103,820 → 90,069 → 101,079 → 117,960. Overall, there is a fluctuating and backward trend, reaching the highest ranking in the past five years at 117,960 in 2025, which is about 16,881 places behind 2024, indicating significant downward pressure. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 20, 19, 22, 28, and 33 students, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 35 students, an increase of 2 students (+6.1%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2025 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked approximately 195th, and in 2026 it did not enter the top 200, placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 institutions. There are no significant event records for Tibet University in the reputation file. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 30th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.38 million, indicating a certain level of attention on short video platforms. There are no records of enrollment gaps in the abnormal enrollment file. Fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.6%) compared to 440,208 in 2025, indicating a slight expansion in the examinee pool. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, which is far from Guangdong, so regional preference may be low. The university's enrollment of Physics Category students in Guangdong in 2025 was 33, which is a relatively small scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+6.1%), and the slight increase in Physics Category examinees (+3.6%), the expansion effect slightly outweighs the increase in examinees, leading to a slight easing of competition but continued backward shift in rankings. The relatively high Douyin popularity provides some offset. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 122,549, with a range of 122,049 to 123,049.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<122,049), you can focus on aiming for popular majors such as Clinical Medicine and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>123,049), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors and fill in cautiously.

From 2021 to 2024, the overall trend was moving forward (from 26273 to 19182), but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift to 36301, moving back about 17119 positions compared to 2024, with drastic fluctuations; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for History Category were 10, 11, 13, 7, and 15 students respectively, with a plan of 13 students for 2026, a reduction of 2 students (-13.3%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push the ranking numbers higher.

学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. 预测结论.text: Combining the baseline of the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the reduction of 2 students (-13.3%) in 2026, and the 11.6% increase in History Category candidates in Guangdong Province, competition will significantly intensify; the relatively hot Douyin attention provides some offset but with limited effect.
